23 October 2023

Mr. Tan Wei Ming  
NRIC: S8765432B  
123 Orchard Road, #12-34  
Singapore 567890

Dear Mr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Software Engineer at Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456X). Your commencement date will be 15 November 2023. You will report directly to Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Head of Technology.

Your monthly remuneration will be SGD 8,500, payable at the end of each month. You will also be entitled to benefits as outlined in our employee handbook, which will be provided to you upon your start date.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning this letter by 30 October 2023. Should you have any queries, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@techinnovations.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Dr. Adrian Lee  
Managing Director  
Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd.  
adrian.lee@techinnovations.sg

[Signature Line]
